_comment: Illustrative INVALID example (its rejection is asserted by the Post `run-document` stage as one of the corpus's checked-in negatives): two addons both declare slot 1 — no roster slot may have two owners. Run `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-autopilot-bad-slot.json` to see it rejected with a clear, source-attributed error at addons[1].slot and exit code 2.
